# Zia NFC — Premium NFC Digital Business Card & Profile Platform

> Zia NFC (https://zianfc.vercel.app) is Azerbaijan's premier NFC (Near Field Communication) digital business card, digital profile hosting, and restaurant QR menu platform.

## Summary

Zia NFC enables professionals, creators, and businesses to replace traditional paper business cards with dynamic, interactive digital profiles. By tapping an NFC-enabled card/sticker or scanning a QR code, contacts and customers instantly view digital business cards, portfolios, social media links, location maps, and vCard downloads.

## Core Features & Services

- **NFC Digital Business Cards**: Premium physical smart cards embedded with NFC chips for instant contact sharing.
- **NFC Stickers & Table Stands**: Compact adhesive stickers for phones/laptops and desktop stands for cafes/restaurants.
- **Digital Profile Hosting**: Mobile-first responsive profile pages hosted 24/7 with customizable themes.
- **Instant vCard Export**: Allows contacts to save full phone numbers and info to their mobile phonebook in 1 click.
- **Interactive Portfolio Showcase**: Visual gallery to showcase services, designs, and work without messy links.
- **Zia Menyu (Restaurant QR Menu)**: Digital menu solution for cafes and restaurants with categories, items, and ordering.
- **Analytics & Admin Dashboard**: Track profile visits, interactions, and customize links in real-time.

## Key Links & URLs

- [Homepage](https://zianfc.vercel.app): Main platform overview and pricing.
- [Public Profile Pattern](https://zianfc.vercel.app/u/{slug}): Individual user digital business cards.
- [Restaurant Profile Pattern](https://zianfc.vercel.app/r/{slug}): Restaurant digital menus.
- [Sitemap](https://zianfc.vercel.app/sitemap.xml): Full URL structure of indexed public pages.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Zia NFC?
Zia NFC is a digital profile platform that combines NFC technology with cloud-hosted digital profile pages.

### How does contact sharing work?
When an NFC card is tapped against a smartphone (or QR code scanned), the phone instantly opens the user's digital profile page without requiring any app installation.

### Can profiles be updated after purchasing?
Yes, profile information (links, bio, portfolio, phone numbers) can be updated anytime in real-time via the admin dashboard without changing the physical card.
